## Meeting Purpose

[Final technical sync before the soft launch.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Blocker:** A critical bug was found where overview charts fail to backfill after prompt changes. This creates a data integrity issue, as the charts become inaccurate.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The backfill process strains the Postgres DB with high write volume, causing replication lag. This is the bottleneck, not S3 download speed or the lack of a data warehouse.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**Launch Plan:** The soft launch is confirmed for Wednesday, with the hard launch on Thursday. Jose is prioritizing a fix for the backfill bug today.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [**Billing Ready:** The Stripe integration is complete, with production credentials ready for deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

## Topics

### Launch Blocker: Chart Backfilling

  - [**Problem:** Overview charts do not backfill when a user changes their prompts (e.g., adding/removing from the library).](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Impact:** This causes data integrity issues, as the 60-day charts become inaccurate.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Inconsistency:** The system *does* backfill charts when a user changes competitors, highlighting the bug.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The backfill process generates high write volume, straining the Postgres DB and causing replication lag.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Note:** This is the bottleneck, not S3 download speed or the lack of a data warehouse. A data warehouse would speed up snapshots but not solve the DB strain.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [**Proposed Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Safeguard:** Limit how often users can change prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
          - [**Risk:** Frustrates users who make mistakes or need to quickly iterate on their prompt selection.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**Scheduled Backfill:** Run backfills once daily.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
          - [**Risk:** Data remains inaccurate for up to 24 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Launch & Monitor:** Deploy without a fix and address it post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
          - [**Risk:** High likelihood of user complaints, especially from data-intensive users (e.g., EMs).](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Launch Readiness & QA

  - [**Billing (Estevão):**](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Merged the upgrade flow backfilling feature.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Prepared a PR to deploy real Stripe production credentials.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
          - [**Note:** This will disable Sandbox testing. Erickson will use a real GrowthX card for final validation.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [Added basic branding (logo) to the Stripe customer portal and checkout.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [Next: Replace the waitlist with the sign-up flow and conduct a final test pass.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Onboarding (Jose):**](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [Fixed a bug where the primary subcategorization was not saved during onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Impact:** This caused the subcategory chart in the overview to appear empty.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**Analytics & Support (Stevie):**](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [**PostHog:** Discovered the current plan lacks aggregate functionality, preventing analysis by workspace (the billing unit).](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [**Intercom:** Ramping up on the new interface and added Jason as a teammate for launch support.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [**Onboarding Events:** Confirmed onboarding events are tracked, but some events lack a `workspace_id`, limiting analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/qmyzG6sD22KxARmuvEjG81QJQtdFysUg?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
